tasks.title: Centralize External Secrets Management
tasks.description: Install pass, generate GPG key, migrate all secrets from ~/.openclaw/.env, credentials/, n8n-stack/.env into encrypted store.

tasks.title: ClawVault: task + backlog management
tasks.description: Use clawvault task instead of ad-hoc tracking. Triage auto-captured backlog items regularly.

tasks.title: ClawVault: register active projects
tasks.description: Register Dominica proposal, SXM cams, n8n workflows etc. so context pulls are project-aware.

tasks.title: ClawVault: custom observation routes
tasks.description: Configure routing rules so topic patterns get categorized correctly (topic 197→dominica, 99→coastguard, etc.)

tasks.title: ClawVault: commitment tracking discipline
tasks.description: Create commitments when agreeing to tasks (observe already started extracting some). Build the habit.

tasks.title: ClawVault: preferences + patterns recording
tasks.description: Record working preferences as they come up (not just USER.md). Log recurring behavioral patterns for self-improvement.

tasks.title: ClawVault: session recaps for long sessions
tasks.description: Generate recaps for long sessions before they expire. Preserve context across session resets.

tasks.title: Mission Control Dashboard
tasks.description: Single-page dashboard: agent activity, system health, calendar, tasks

tasks.title: Watchdog auto-repair + Mission Control tab
tasks.description: Auto-repair engine with 5-level escalation, crash loop detection, JSON logging. New Watchdog tab in Mission Control dashboard.

tasks.title: Update n8n Docker mount path
tasks.description: Update docker-compose mount from mission-control/api to data/mission-control and restart container

tasks.title: Update n8n Code node calendar response mapping
tasks.description: Include full calendar event fields (start, end, id, status, htmlLink) in the Google Calendar webhook response

tasks.title: Deploy and smoke test sxm-cams
tasks.proof: Restarted the sxm-cams nginx container so the updated bind-mounted index.html was served, verified the public site now includes the new External Sources entries, and confirmed /api/tokens returns valid JSON with fresh maho/island/port token data.

tasks.title: Trace mission-control Vercel repo/root mismatch and identify exact setting to change
Inspect Skyline cams for direct playable stream URLs
tasks.proof: Replaced Sunset Beach external Skyline entry with direct YouTube cam 1-ymuIHWSp0 in sxm-cams/index.html, restarted the sxm-cams container, and verified the live site now serves the YouTube-based Sunset entry.

tasks.title: Improve sxm-cams grid previews and fix non-playing tiles
tasks.proof: Updated sxm-cams grid view so PTZtv HLS cams render live video tiles in grid mode, Skyline cams render real preview images from Skyline social thumbnails, and external preview tiles now open the live source directly when clicked. Restarted the sxm-cams container and verified the live site serves the new grid code.

tasks.title: Make Skyline cams open directly from app
tasks.proof: Updated sxm-cams so external Skyline entries open the live source directly in a new tab instead of rendering an intermediate external-card view. Restarted the sxm-cams container and verified the live site serves the new direct-open behavior.

tasks.title: Fix Skyline previews and disconnecting cams in sxm-cams
tasks.proof: Added explicit APP_VERSION cache-busting to Skyline preview image URLs, switched preview image loading to eager, and added an onerror fallback message for failed Skyline preview loads. Restarted sxm-cams and verified the live site serves the updated preview logic.

tasks.title: Remove duplicate Skyline cams from sxm-cams
tasks.proof: Removed duplicate Skyline entries Great Bay Beach and Simpson Bay Beach Alt from sxm-cams/index.html, restarted the sxm-cams container, and verified the live site no longer serves those entries.

tasks.title: Search for additional Dinghy's Beach Bar cams in Sint Maarten
tasks.proof: Checked other webcam sites beyond Skyline. Found no clear extra Dinghy's Beach Bar-branded Sint Maarten cams. Found additional Sint Maarten cams on ShowMe Caribbean (Kim Sha Beach, Great Bay Boardwalk, Maho Beach) and CruisingEarth mirrors for airport/beach, Simpson Bay Beach, and Great Bay Beach.

tasks.title: Inspect non-Skyline Sint Maarten cams for grid-playable sources
tasks.proof: Inspected non-Skyline Sint Maarten cam pages. CruisingEarth pages are mostly wrappers around existing YouTube embeds: airport/beach -> neSVXln_ozA, Simpson Bay -> 525dNEryfQ4, Great Bay -> N5Mb2bjYwZo. ShowMe Caribbean pages appear to be Wix YouTube players and likely map to existing SHOWME Caribbean feeds: Kim Sha Beach -> Simpson Bay Resort feeds (vxHKAImxUHk / 525dNEryfQ4), Great Bay Boardwalk -> N5Mb2bjYwZo, Maho Beach -> UFM56RJYgb4 or iSeH45R-8R0. Best grid-playable path is other YouTube-based feeds, not Skyline.

tasks.title: Add non-duplicate playable Sint Maarten cams
tasks.proof: Added the distinct non-duplicate YouTube cam neSVXln_ozA as 'Airport & Beach' from Tortuga Maho Café to sxm-cams/index.html, restarted the sxm-cams container, and verified the live site serves the new entry.

tasks.title: Force sxm-cams homescreen URL to refresh
tasks.proof: Added no-store/no-cache headers for the dashboard HTML in sxm-cams/proxy.conf, restarted the sxm-cams container, and verified https://cams.n8n-andy.xyz now returns Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, proxy-revalidate, max-age=0 plus Pragma: no-cache and Expires: 0.

tasks.title: Aggressively search for more Dinghy's Beach Bar cam sources
tasks.proof: Searched for more Dinghy's Beach Bar cam sources. X search found no active Dinghy's live cam posts. Dinghy's own site exists and clearly has an SXM page, but direct fetches from this host are blocked by Incapsula bot protection, so I could not inspect the page HTML for hidden cam embeds or alternate feeds from here.
